name: cta-section-12
description: Newsletter subscription CTA with muted background card, two-column grid layout with rounded workspace image on left, right side featuring muted nested card with heading about building better products, muted text mentioning 1,000,000+ subscribers, horizontal flex email form with background-colored input field and primary button for subscribing
